archetype: Void-Script Architect (Archetype 4: Swiss High-Contrast + Retro-Futurism Terminal)

core_identity.name: Akshay Babu Anthoorveettil
core_stats: 5 Platforms Automated (Web, Mobile, API, Desktop, iOS)

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Control Room style for data, Tetris style for projects)

surface_strategies.cards: Retro-Futurism / Terminal Look: Flat #111111 background, 1px border-white/10. Hover: border-emerald-500/50 + subtle drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)].
surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with 1px border-b border-white/10. Sticky at top.
surface_strategies.buttons: Terminal style: squared (rounded-none), 1px solid primary color. Hover fills background with primary color, text becomes black. Use a blinking block cursor effect.

components_strategy.skills_matrix: Grid borders (border-collapse style) exposing the skeleton. Categories: Automation Tools, Languages, Frameworks, Cloud/DevOps, Specialized Capabilities.
components_strategy.automation_demo: A large mock IDE/Terminal window prominently in the Hero section. Mac dots on top-left. Content types out via Framer Motion showing Playwright/Selenium test execution. Lines appear sequentially. Final output shows green '100% PASS' with test execution stats.
components_strategy.chat_ai: 'Ask Akshay's AI'. A command-line style interface instead of a generic chat bubble. User input preceded by '>'. AI response preceded by 'Claude$'. Responses stream in like a terminal.
components_strategy.projects: Hover over project cards reveals text like a decrypted payload or system diagnostic report. Includes: Solstice insurance Playwright POM, South West WorkTop with AWS Bedrock, M2A/Signet, Pepco OCR POS, Christies hospitality.
components_strategy.work_experience: Timeline formatted like a server log file or git commit history. (Coforge Nov 2024-Present, Cigniti Feb-Nov 2024, Cigniti Jun 2023-Feb 2024).

motion_and_interactions.hover: High contrast shifts. Terminal cursor blinking on active elements.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling mandatory for premium feel.
motion_and_interactions.automation_runner: Sequence of text typing out, rapid log lines appearing with green checkmarks. Use framer-motion staggerChildren.

images.description: Minimalist dark noise texture for background overlay (opacity 5-10%). Blend mode: overlay.
Matrix code background. Use sparingly inside the Automation Demo container or masked behind the hero section with very low opacity.
Server room green lights. Use as a subtle image overlay for project thumbnails to give a hardware/backend feel.

assets_and_media.icons: lucide-react for standard icons, use simple sharp SVGs where possible.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over terminal background is WCAG AA/AAA. Use text-shadow if necessary for glowing text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., 'resume-download-btn', 'ask-ai-input', 'project-link-[name]').

instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts or fontsource.
Install 'framer-motion' for typing effects and terminal log animations.
Avoid standard Shadcn rounded cards. Strip out border-radius classes to enforce the sharp, 0px border-radius terminal aesthetic.

The Hero section must NOT be a generic left-text right-image. Emphasize the 'Automation Demo' terminal window spanning a large portion of the layout, with 'Akshay's Stats' visually acting as system parameters/diagnostics on the side.
Implement the live Automation Demo using a sequence of staggered timeouts or Framer Motion to simulate a test script typing and executing in real-time.
Keep gradients to an absolute minimum. Rely on stark borders, neon accents on pure dark backgrounds, and subtle noise textures.
